title: Indian Army NCC 125th Special Entry Scheme 2026 + Government Job + India + Apply Now
excerpt: The Indian Army is inviting applications for the NCC 125th Special Entry Scheme 2026. Eligible candidates can apply online from 20 July 2026 to 20 August 2026. The scheme offers a great opportunity to serve the nation and develop a successful career in the army.
value_prop: _Unlock a rewarding career in the Indian Army with the NCC 125th Special Entry Scheme 2026_

About Organization

The Indian Army is the land-based branch and the largest component of the Indian Armed Forces. The President of India serves as the Supreme Commander of the Indian Army, and it is commanded by the Chief of Army Staff (COAS), who is a four-star general.

The Indian Army is responsible for protecting the nation from external threats and maintaining peace and security within the country.

About the Programme

The NCC 125th Special Entry Scheme 2026 is a great opportunity for eligible candidates to join the Indian Army and serve the nation. The scheme offers a chance to develop a successful career in the army and contribute to the country's defense.

The programme is designed to attract talented and motivated individuals who are passionate about serving the nation and developing a rewarding career in the army.
